subcodes.title: Answer to Shaykh ‘Ali
subcodes.first_line: Verily God is Peace, and from Him cometh Peace, and upon Him resteth Peace, and unto Him ascendeth Peace - glorified and exalted be He! There is no God but Him. Then Peace within Peace, from Peace unto Peace - Muhammad, the Apostle of God, upon Him and His kindred be Peace - the Mystery of the letters of Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. ان الله هو السلام و منه السلام و علیه السلام و الیه یرفع السلام سبحانه و تعالی لا اله الا هو ثم السلام فی السلام عن السلام الی السلام محمد رسول الله صلی الله علیه و آله سر احرف التوحید
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
